SEARCH
Module com.example.simul2d
Package com.example.simul2d.JavaFX

Class DrawingController

java.lang.Object
com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.DrawingController
All Implemented Interfaces:
NeedsUiState
public class DrawingController extends Object implements NeedsUiState
Controller responsible for building and handling drawing/tool UI elements.

This controller populates material and entity selection buttons and forwards user tool selections into the shared `UiState` model.
